meta.description: Receives signed review requests from the landing page, upserts the Enquiry Reviews sheet, and sends confirmation + internal emails.
meta.idempotency: Skip append when lead_id already exists in the sheet

emails.source: Use payload.emails.confirmation and payload.emails.internal (subject + text) prepared by the landing API
rules: Repeat: public information only, no test enquiry
Omit delivery timing unless configured in site-config

n8n_steps: 1. Webhook (POST) — production URL path only; do not expose to the browser
2. Verify HMAC: compute hex(hmac_sha256(secret, `${X-Standout-Timestamp}.${rawBody}`)) and compare to X-Standout-Signature; reject if timestamp skew > 5 minutes
3. Validate required fields: lead_id, name, firm_name, work_email, website, requested_at
4. Google Sheets lookup by lead_id — if found, return 200 { ok: true, duplicate: true }
5. Append row with status=Requested and updated_at=now; leave commercial/delivery columns empty
6. Send confirmation email to work_email from achow@standoutgroup.net
7. Send internal notification with lead_id, firm, website, source, campaign
8. Update confirmation_email_sent_at on success; write last_error and alert on failure
